summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of VRM file upload fix. Verified that both file inputs (studio-vrm-file-input and rail-vrm-file-input) now have broadened accept attribute including 'application/octet-stream' to prevent OS/mobile file pickers from graying out .vrm files. All upload flows, UI interactions, and client-side validation working correctly.
passed_tests: Page loads with empty viewport dropzone visible (data-testid='studio-empty-dropzone')
Valid VRM file upload via rail-vrm-file-input successful - toast 'VRM loaded' appeared
Project chip displays VRM filename (test.vrm) after upload
VRM character renders correctly in 3D viewport
Animation clip 'Wave' (data-testid='animation-clip-wave') is selectable and shows selected state
Materials tab (data-testid='tab-materials') displays 16 material slots correctly
Negative test: Non-VRM file (.txt) triggers error toast 'Please choose a .vrm file' as expected
Client-side extension validation (.vrm suffix check) working correctly
